name: Nut Fingers/Good Housekeeping
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Walnuts, toasted and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Good Housekeeping 12/94
In a large bowl, beat butter with a mixer on low speed until blended. Increase the speed to high and continue beating until light and fluffy. Add flour and remaining ingredients; stir until a ball forms. If needed, knead the mixture in the bowl until it forms a ball.
Preheat oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit. Roll out 1 level tablespoon of dough into a 6-inch rope. Cut the rope crosswise into halves. Repeat with the remaining dough and place on ungreased large cookie sheets about 1 inch apart. Bake for 15 minutes or until edges begin to brown. Remove cookies from the oven using a pancake turner and cool them on wire racks. Sprinkle cookies with 2 tablespoons of confectioners' sugar. Makes about 6 dozen cookies.
